title: polygala nana
intro: Polygala nana, also known as Dwarf Polygala, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Polygalaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala nana include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Polygala nana is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, as well as being used in capsule or tincture form, to utilize its medicinal properties effectively.
intro_study: According to "Journal of ethnopharmacology", polygala nana benefits include treating diseases such as premature graying hair, deficiency of blood and essence, diabetes, hypertension, and satisfying hunger and providing many health benefits due to its rich non-starch polysaccharides and fructo-oligosaccharides, as well as its anti-hidden hunger property and pharmacological activities including immune regulation, blood glucose regulation, lipid-lowering, antioxidant, anti-tumor, and antibacterial effects.
